description: Canonical startup governance records for reviewed development automation. Machine-local launch paths stay in reports/.

entries.purpose: Start the Windows-host ChatGPT local-files MCP runtime and reviewed tunnel connector on operator login.
entries.source: startup audit; ChatGPT Local Files MCP security hardening
entries.notes: Candidate startup authority for the reviewed local-files MCP runtime. Startup must use the dedicated chatgpt-local-files-mcp Cloudflare config or an explicitly reviewed override; full local command lines and config paths stay in reports.

entries.purpose: Start Codex remote services on login.
entries.notes: Detected as Codex-created startup automation for codex-remote.colorgeek.co.

entries.purpose: Keep the codex-calendar-todo local staging server available.
entries.notes: Scheduled task uses a local repo path in the machine report; registry stores only stable script reference.

entries.purpose: Run Cloudflare tunnel routes for reviewed local services.
entries.notes: Service is running automatically; route ownership and duplicate hostnames are governed in public-routes.registry.json.

entries.purpose: Enable reviewed on-demand recovery of the LM Studio local API on 127.0.0.1:1234.
entries.source: LM Studio local API and local agent governance review
entries.notes: Recovery uses the reviewed LM Studio restart wrapper; machine-local launch command details remain in wrapper evidence and reports.

entries.purpose: Start the TipsTerminal helper at login.
entries.notes: Development automation candidate from Registry Run; review before approval.

entries.purpose: Start the DevGov public tunnel connector and unified 127.0.0.1:3000 origin on operator login.
entries.notes: Reviewed opt-in startup mechanism for the Zero Trust protected gov.colorgeek.co and dev.colorgeek.co routes. The start script checks existing health and process state before starting hidden background helpers.

entries.purpose: Start the DevGov dashboard on operator login after reviewed opt-in.
entries.notes: Reviewed opt-in startup mechanism. The registration script writes machine-local launch details only when explicitly run by an operator.

entries.purpose: Open DevGov on demand and auto-start the local dashboard server if it is not already running.
entries.notes: No always-on service is required. The devgov://open handler launches the opener, which performs a health check and starts the loopback dashboard only when requested.

entries.purpose: Run the resident local archive/index worker and loopback app-server.
entries.notes: Windows service is automatic and uses a service-local deployment home. Full command line, token file, logs, and state data stay in generated evidence, not canonical registry data.

entries.purpose: Start the PS3 Eye frame feeder and Windows virtual camera on operator login.
entries.source: PS3 Eye virtual camera startup and doctor design review
entries.notes: Reviewed current-user startup mechanism. The runtime wrapper calls the repo doctor repair mode, checks stale feeder PID state, and keeps machine-local launch details in generated evidence only.

entries.purpose: Start tunnel-client local filesystem MCP bridge on operator login.
entries.notes: Startup entry calls tunnel-client-runtime.ps1 in QuickStart mode and keeps machine-local launch details outside registry.
